subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which important city in Rajasthan is associated with the Jaisalmer Desert Festival?

explanation_en: The Jaisalmer Desert Festival is associated with Jaipur. Jaipur, known as the Pink City, hosts various festivals throughout the year.
